[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111100001 5
1 010001010 3
2 111000100 4
3 000011011 4
4 001011111 6
5 011111101 7
6 110111001 6
7 111101001 6

12 21 011111101 7 match 5
23 32 110111001 6 match 6
34 43 111101001 6 match 7
45 54 111101011 7
56 65 111001110 6
67 76 111011110 7
70 07 000011011 4 match 3

13 31 111001101 6

46 64 111100101 6
57 75 010011010 4
60 06 111011111 8
71 17 001011111 6 match 4
